story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_0100_10: I’m so sorry, but in that scene just now...
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_0200_10: I think a slower entrance might work better.
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_0300_10: Ah, sorry! I had that wrong!
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_0400_10: No, not at all! My directions were unclear.
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_0500_10:
Oh! Excuse me. I’d like to confirm something
about the lighting.
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_0600_10:
I think we should change the angle to better
convey the feeling of embracing a challenge.
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_1100_10: Oh my! What brings you all here?
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_1200_10:
La Primera’s busy rehearsing for the play,
so we came to check on you for her!
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_1300_10:
That boss of ours is always working us to
the bone...
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_1400_10:
*chuckle*
I see Geeta’s doing her best, too!
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_1500_10: If only I had her leadership skills...
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_1800_10:
This time, I’m also the stage director,
which means I’m in charge of organizing
and managing everyone.
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_1900_10:
But I’m learning firsthand what a challenge it
can be.
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_2000_10: I’m just envious of Geeta’s leadership.
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_2100_10:
La Primera does have a lot of leadership
experience, given her position!
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_2200_10:
She may seem all professional and perfectly
put together, but she can be absent-minded
sometimes.
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_2300_10:
Someone’s gotta look after her, and that’s
where we come in!
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_2500_10:
She just seems so competent, as if she can
handle everything herself.
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_2600_10:
It’s OK to be like Geeta yet still ask for help,
Diantha!
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_2800_10:
You have someone too—your partner
Pokémon!
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_2900_10:
Yeah! Helping each other is what bein’ a
sync pair’s all about!
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_3000_10:
True... Gardevoir are known for bonding
closely with their Trainer.
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_3100_10:
Plus, they can sense human emotions! With
my Gardevoir’s help, perhaps I could lead
more effectively!
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_3200_10: What do you say, Gardevoir? Up to the task?
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_3300_10:
You look exhausted, Sabrina! Don’t push
yourself too hard.
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_3600_10:
That’s what happens when you work
together with your Pokémon!
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_3700_10:
They truly are bonded. What a stunning
sync pair!
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_4100_10:
Awww, don’t cry, Grandpa Hassel! There,
there—wanna hug?
story_arceus_10_05000/2401_1001_4200_10:
I sure wish a Gardevoir would step in to
shield me from La Primera...
